blocks.text: Glimt stun Inter — Norway produces a Champions League giant-killing
Sørloth added a hat-trick as Atlético crushed Club Brugge 4-1 the same night. Norwegian football is having an extraordinary Champions League week.
⛷️ 16:05 — Biathlon WC Women's 15km Individual, Kontiolahti — Tandrevold, Røiseland, Kirkeeide
